channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tony Blair Criticizes His Party but Avoids Full Candor
item.description: The former UK prime minister's critique of Labour policy lacks introspection.

item.title: DOJ requests judge recuse herself from Georgia election case over Fani Willis event attendance
item.description: The Justice Department asks a judge to step aside in a Georgia election records dispute, citing her reported attendance at an event honoring Fani Willis.

item.title: The Kilmar Abrego Garcia Case Remains Baffling
item.description: Despite any gang ties, Abrego would have been deported months ago if not for government maneuvering.

item.title: Swatting at Justice Barrett's Home Seen as Another 'Hit' From Schumer's 'Whirlwind'
item.description: The dangerous swatting incident is the latest in a rise of leftist-led political violence during the Trump era.
